name: Authentication
description: Clerk auth with Google/Microsoft OAuth, magic link, user management

name: Multi-tenant workspace
description: Neon PostgreSQL, RLS, workspace creation, tenant isolation

name: Core data model
description: Company, Contact, Deal, Activity entities with JSONB properties, Drizzle ORM

name: Chat interface
description: Streaming chat with AI SDK, persistent threads, chat history sidebar

name: Settings and onboarding
description: Workspace settings, user profile, onboarding flow, ICP configuration

name: Email sync
description: Google/Microsoft OAuth email sync, backsync, auto-capture inbound/outbound

name: Calendar sync
description: Meeting auto-detection from calendar, participant extraction

name: Activity timeline
description: Unified timeline per contact/company/deal showing all interactions

name: Auto-summarization
description: AI summarization of email threads and meetings with key points extraction

name: Embedding + RAG pipeline
description: Embed all interactions with text-embedding-3-small, pgvector storage, retrieval

name: NL queries with citations
description: Answer questions about business with citations to original conversations

name: CSV import
description: Import contacts/companies/deals from CSV with field mapping

name: Company enrichment
description: Firmographics, industry, size, tech stack from data providers

name: Contact enrichment
description: Title, email, LinkedIn, phone from data providers

name: TAM builder
description: Auto-build TAM from ICP description using data providers + AI

name: ML scoring
description: Account/contact scoring with explanations using enrichment + signals

name: Signal overlay
description: Job postings, funding, tech changes, website visits as scoring signals

name: AI semantic search
description: NL queries over TAM: 'crypto companies hiring RAG engineers'

name: Sequence builder
description: Multi-step email sequences with delays, conditions, templates

name: AI email writer
description: Generate personalized emails from enrichment + signals + memory

name: Autopilot enrollment
description: AI decides who to enroll in sequences, when, and with what messaging

name: Email sending infrastructure
description: SES integration, mailbox rotation, warm-up tracking, SPF/DKIM/DMARC

name: Reply detection
description: Detect replies and auto-stop sequence, classify positive/negative/OOO

name: Deal management
description: Kanban + list views, create/edit deals, drag-drop stages

name: Signal-based stage progression
description: Auto-progress deals based on email activity, meeting count, stakeholder engagement

name: Risk detection
description: Flag ghosting, stalls, competitor mentions with reasons

name: Auto-generated deal summaries
description: AI-written deal overview from all captured interactions

name: CRO Copilot
description: Chat-based deal coaching with specific actionable feedback

name: Prioritized actions
description: AI suggests most important actions to close more revenue

name: Background job system
description: BullMQ on Redis for async jobs: enrichment, email, sequences
